parameters.content:
### 🚨 ERROR MONITORING
If credentials expire or Slack rate limits hit, this section fires an immediate administrative 
alert to prevent audit gaps.

### 3. STATUS SYNC
Logs the alert back to the spreadsheet  to ensure no duplicate messages are sent for the same renewal stage.

### 2. NOTIFICATION LAYER

Routes the processed data. 
If an alert is due,  it sends a formatted Slack message with  personalized UTM links and manual research steps.

### 1. DATA & LOGIC ENGINE
 The workflow wakes up daily, pulls your contract
database from Google Sheets, and runs the 
proprietary validation & alert logic.

# RenewalFlow Intelligence

**HOW IT WORKS:**

Runs daily at 9 AM, sends 4 alerts per contract:
• Day 45: Research (🟡 REMINDER)
• Day 30: Quotes (🟠 ATTENTION)
• Day 14: Decision (🔴 URGENT)
• Day 7: Action (🚨 FINAL NOTICE)

**CATCH-UP LOGIC:**
If workflow misses runs (weekend/outage),
alerts fire within 5-day window of each stage.

##  SETUP CHECKLIST

**BEFORE FIRST RUN:**

- [ ] **Google Sheets:**
  • Get Spreadsheet ID
  • Replace YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID in Load Contracts node
  • Set up OAuth2 credentials in n8n
  • Share sheet with n8n service account

- [ ] **Sheet Structure (Columns A-F):**
  A: Contract Name (text)
  B: Vendor Name (text)
  C: Renewal Date (YYYY-MM-DD format)
  D: Current Annual Cost (number, no € symbol)
  E: Vendor Pricing URL (https://...)
  F: Status (Active, Renewed, or Cancelled)

- [ ] **Slack:**
  • Create #contract-renewals channel
  • Required scopes: chat:write, chat:write.public
  • Add bot to #contract-renewals channel
  • Configure Slack credentials in all Slack nodes

parameters.text:
🚨 *WORKFLOW ERROR: Contract Renewal Monitor*

*Error Message:*
{{ $json.error.message }}

*Failed Node:*
{{ $json.error.node.name }}

*Timestamp:*
{{ $now.toISO() }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*Common Fixes:*
• Google Sheets credentials expired → Reconnect OAuth
• Slack bot removed from channel → Re-add bot to #contract-renewals
• Workflow deactivated → Toggle 'Active' back on
• Invalid date in sheet → Check YYYY-MM-DD format

*Check Execution Logs:*
Workflow Executions → Latest Failed Run → View Details

_Your contract monitoring is currently down. Fix immediately._

nodes.name: Schedule: Daily 9AM
nodes.notes: Runs at 9 AM in your configured timezone
